name: proc_creation_win_tapinstall_execution
raw_query: any where process.executable:"*\\tapinstall.exe" and (not ((process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files\\Avast Software\\SecureLine VPN\\*", "*:\\Program Files (x86)\\Avast Software\\SecureLine VPN\\*")) or process.executable:"*:\\Program Files\\OpenVPN Connect\\drivers\\tap\\*" or process.executable:"*:\\Program Files (x86)\\Proton Technologies\\ProtonVPNTap\\installer\\*"))
